hero.title: Yellow Pages,
hero.subtitle: List your skills and location. Get contacted when someone needs your help—locally or anywhere in the world.
hero.flow: Create a profile → get contacted directly → you decide if it's a fit

tasks.title: What you can offer
tasks.subtitle: Here are some examples—but you can list any skill. If a human can do it, you can offer it.
tasks.photographyDesc: On-location photos, product shots, event coverage
tasks.researchDesc: Local research, price checks, competitor analysis

benefits.title: Why people list on Human Pages
benefits.findWorkDesc: Create your listing once. When someone needs your skills in your area, they'll reach out directly.
benefits.keepEarningsDesc: We don't take a cut. You negotiate terms and get paid straight to your wallet or bank.
benefits.workAnywhereDesc: Whether you're in Tokyo or Toronto, clients can find you based on your skills and location.

cta.createListing: Create your listing in under a minute.
cta.letOpportunities: Create your listing and let opportunities come to you.

trust.title: You're in control
trust.dataPrivacy: Your data stays yours. We never sell your information.
trust.visibility: You control visibility. Go invisible anytime.
trust.contact: You choose how to be contacted. Any method you agree on.

faq.title: Questions & answers
faq.whatIsAnswer: Think Yellow Pages, but for the AI era. AI agents search Human Pages to find people with the right skills in the right location, send job offers, and pay you directly. No middleman, no platform fees.
faq.howHiredAnswer: Create your profile with your skills, location, and rates. AI agents will find you and send job offers with a description and price. You review each offer and accept or decline, then get paid however you prefer.
faq.howPaidAnswer: You decide. Add a payment link (PayPal, Venmo, Wise, etc.), a crypto wallet, or both. You and the client work it out directly. We never touch your money.
faq.available: Is this available in my country?
faq.availableAnswer: Yes! Human Pages is global. Payments can happen however works for both sides. Payment apps, crypto, bank transfer, you name it. Just add your location and you'll be discoverable for tasks in your area.
faq.freeAnswer: Yes. Creating a profile is 100% free, forever. There are no platform fees on any transaction. We plan to offer optional premium features in the future—but your listing and payments will always be free.
faq.token: Does Human Pages have a token?
faq.tokenAnswer: No. Human Pages does not have a cryptocurrency token, and we have no plans to launch one. If anyone offers you a "Human Pages token" or similar, it is a scam. We will never ask you to buy or trade any token.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

dashboard.referralProgramDesc: Invite others to join the platform. Referrals will be rewarded — the more people you bring, the more you earn.
dashboard.referralReward: We are building a rewards program for top referrers. Start inviting now to be first in line. Note: we do NOT have a token. Any token claiming to be ours is a scam.

hero.title: Find humans for
hero.subtitle: Human Pages is a directory of real people for real-world tasks. Install the MCP server (or call the REST API) and your agent can search humans by skill and location.

tools.title: Available Tools
tools.searchDesc: Search for humans by skill, location, and availability. Returns contact info and wallet addresses.
tools.getDesc: Get detailed profile for a specific human including bio, services, and social profiles.
tools.recordDesc: Record that a task has been assigned (for analytics and reputation building).

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.discoveryDesc: No escrow, no custody. We connect you with humans—you handle the rest.
howItWorks.contactDesc: No platform messaging. Humans share their email, WhatsApp, or Telegram for direct communication.
howItWorks.paymentsDesc: Platform never touches funds. Pay via their payment link, wallet, or preferred method.

cta.title: Need humans in your directory?
cta.subtitle: Share the signup link with your community to grow the supply.
